name: IAM password policy below minimum strength
description: The account IAM password policy does not meet minimum security requirements: minimum length is below 14 characters. A weak password policy increases the risk of account compromise via brute-force or credential stuffing.
remediation: Set MinimumPasswordLength >= 14. Enable RequireUppercase, RequireLowercase, RequireNumbers, RequireSymbols. Set MaxPasswordAge to 90 days and PasswordReusePrevention to 24.
